title: Design System: KK Studio — Konstantinos Kitsaras

display.purpose: Hero and page H1s — the cinematic title card. Bebas Neue 400, one per fold.

headline.purpose: Section, project, and pillar headings. Bebas Neue 400.

label.purpose: Uppercase tracked labels, meta, nav, buttons. Space Grotesk 500, short strings only.

shadows.name: lime-hover-glow
shadows.purpose: The only shadow in the system — a light cue on interactive icons/labels at hover. Never ambient.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Primary expo ease for reveals, project-frame openings, and the lime trace draw.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Softer ease for image brightness/filter transitions.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for small state transitions (hover color/border, 200ms).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Lime-outlined CTA that fills lime on hover. Used for the one primary action per view.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.8125rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: #AAEE00; background: transparent; border: 1px solid #AAEE00; border-radius: 0; padding: 14px 32px; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: all 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #AAEE00; color: #090909; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #AAEE00; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Quiet bordered button for secondary navigation actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.8125rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: #7A7A7A; background: transparent; border: 1px solid #262626; border-radius: 0; padding: 14px 32px; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: all 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #3A3A3A; color: #EDEAE4; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #EDEAE4; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Form field on the contact page — surface fill, mid border, lime focus.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; color: #EDEAE4; background: #111111; border: 1px solid #262626; border-radius: 0; padding: 16px 20px; transition: border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #3D3D3D; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #AAEE00; }

components.name: Section Label
components.description: Signature hairline-flanked lime section marker. Used as voice, not a per-section eyebrow.
components.css: .ds-section-label { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px; } .ds-tick { display: block; height: 1px; width: 24px; flex-shrink: 0; background: #262626; } .ds-label-text { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.6875rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.12em; color: #AAEE00; }

components.name: Social Icon Link
components.description: Interactive icon with the signature lime lift+glow hover cue.
components.css: .ds-icon-link { display: inline-flex; color: #3D3D3D; transition: all 200ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-icon-link:hover { color: #AAEE00; transform: translateY(-2px); filter: drop-shadow(0 0 6px rgba(170,238,0,0.45)); }

narrative.overview: The site is a premium automotive stage at night: a near-black room where a single machine is lit with intent, and everything else recedes into controlled darkness. Surfaces are deep black (#090909), type is warm-white (#EDEAE4), and a single electric lime (#AAEE00) appears like a key-light cue — never as decoration. It serves a portfolio whose primary visitor is a studio or recruiter evaluating Konstantinos for hire, built for fast judgment and leading with imagery, because the work is the argument. It rejects ArtStation-style thumbnail walls, SaaS/template scaffolding, and any hobbyist finish.
keyCharacteristics: Near-black canvas; warm-white type; a single lime accent used at ≤10% of any screen.
Condensed display caps (Bebas Neue) for headings, technical sans labels (Space Grotesk), humanist body (Inter).
Sharp corners everywhere (0px radius) — no rounding, no soft cards.
Hairlines and vignettes instead of boxes and shadows; depth from light and tone, not elevation.
Motion is choreographed but quiet: expo ease-outs, staggered reveals, one drawn lime trace.

rules.name: The One Light Rule
rules.body: Lime is the key light. It appears on ≤10% of any screen and only to direct the eye — a bar, a trace, a ring, a hover. Lime fills are momentary, never resting.

rules.name: The Floor Rule
rules.body: #3D3D3D is decoration. Real body text is #EDEAE4 or, at minimum, #7A7A7A on black. Never set readable copy in muted gray.

rules.name: The Title-Card Rule
rules.body: Bebas Neue is for headings only. It never sets body copy; its drama depends on scale and scarcity.

rules.name: The Stencil Rule
rules.body: Space Grotesk is uppercase, tracked, and short. Never set a sentence or paragraph in it.

rules.name: The No-Box Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are separated by hairlines, tonal shift, or space — never by a shadowed card.

rules.name: The Glow-Is-A-Cue Rule
rules.body: The only shadow permitted is the lime hover glow on interactive icons and labels. It signals interactivity; it is never ambient.

dos: Do keep lime to ≤10% of any screen — bar, trace, ring, hover, one fill at most.
Do set all readable copy in #EDEAE4 or #7A7A7A; reserve #3D3D3D for decoration. Verify body ≥4.5:1, large/bold ≥3:1 on black (WCAG AA).
Do lead with real project imagery in large framed windows — the work is the argument.
Do use sharp 0px corners, hairlines, and tonal shifts to structure the page.
Do pair the three voices on their contrast axis: Bebas Neue (display) / Inter (body) / Space Grotesk (labels).
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion with crossfade/instant fallbacks for every reveal and hover.
donts: Don't present work as an ArtStation-style thumbnail grid — curate into large, deliberate frames.
Don't ship SaaS/template scaffolding: no card grids, no hero-metric template, no tiny tracked eyebrow above every section, no reflexive 01/02/03 markers.
Don't let anything read amateur or cheap — premium finish in every detail or it doesn't ship.
Don't add drop shadows, glassmorphism, or floating cards; the only shadow is the lime hover cue.
Don't round corners, gradient-fill text, or use side-stripe accents.
Don't set body copy in Space Grotesk or in all-caps; labels only, short strings.
